feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: 😤 My sole objective is piecing my daughter back together and if you get in my way you getting blasted. #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #vrgaming
entry.content: 😤 My sole objective is piecing my daughter back together and if you get in my way you getting blasted. #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #vrgaming

entry.title: Decided to see what the fuss was about with this new Pragmata game and my god Capcom been killing it. We’ll definitely be adding this to my streaming backlog! #videogames #blerd #capcom #pragmata
entry.content: Decided to see what the fuss was about with this new Pragmata game and my god Capcom been killing it. We’ll definitely be adding this to my streaming backlog! #videogames #blerd #capcom #pragmata

entry.title: Throwback to last year when I was playing Momodora 4 talking about my favorite pizza. What’s your favorite pizza? Anything as unhinged as mine? My favorite is a bbq pizza with at least pineapple, anchovies, sausage, and onions. ##onthisday##blerd##indiega
entry.content: Throwback to last year when I was playing Momodora 4 talking about my favorite pizza. What’s your favorite pizza? Anything as unhinged as mine? My favorite is a bbq pizza with at least pineapple, anchovies, sausage, and onions. ##onthisday##blerd##indiega

entry.title: Combat in Pragmata is too much fun. I clicked with it immediately. I can’t wait to see how the full game expand on it. Dodging videos of folks playing it is difficult 😅 #blerd #videogames #capcom #pragmata
entry.content: Combat in Pragmata is too much fun. I clicked with it immediately. I can’t wait to see how the full game expand on it. Dodging videos of folks playing it is difficult 😅 #blerd #videogames #capcom #pragmata

entry.title: This is exactly why I can’t speedrun lol. I get a great time like this and immediately wonder if I can do better. It might be a minute before I can get Pragmata so I’ll have plenty of time to try. I already had my next stream game lined up but I might ha
entry.content: This is exactly why I can’t speedrun lol. I get a great time like this and immediately wonder if I can do better. It might be a minute before I can get Pragmata so I’ll have plenty of time to try. I already had my next stream game lined up but I might ha

entry.title: So I write these notes for my wife for her to read on her lunch break and I usually draw whatever on the top of it. A few days ago I tried drawing Toon Link and ended up making him look strung out and had to share. My version of Link has definitely seen b
entry.content: So I write these notes for my wife for her to read on her lunch break and I usually draw whatever on the top of it. A few days ago I tried drawing Toon Link and ended up making him look strung out and had to share. My version of Link has definitely seen b

entry.title: If you know what ZSNES is and this news excites you, I can almost bet that you are at least 30 lol. This was some unexpected but welcome news to see yesterday and I tried it for a split second and it felt nostalgic. I always liked ZNES’s aesthetic and wha
entry.content: If you know what ZSNES is and this news excites you, I can almost bet that you are at least 30 lol. This was some unexpected but welcome news to see yesterday and I tried it for a split second and it felt nostalgic. I always liked ZNES’s aesthetic and wha

entry.title: Cops thought this was game… I mean it is but thats not the point cause this is my precinct now! But seriously, I forgot how much fun Hotline Miami was. #blerd #indiegames #videogames #asixverse
entry.content: Cops thought this was game… I mean it is but thats not the point cause this is my precinct now! But seriously, I forgot how much fun Hotline Miami was. #blerd #indiegames #videogames #asixverse

entry.title: These dudes barely gave me a second to get myself together in between retries… I literally had to be moving before the game even loaded to not die. 10/10 would play this level again! #blerd #asixverse #indiegames #videogames
entry.content: These dudes barely gave me a second to get myself together in between retries… I literally had to be moving before the game even loaded to not die. 10/10 would play this level again! #blerd #asixverse #indiegames #videogames

entry.title: This is the one thing I miss in BOTW. This has to be top three glitches in any game. This should be a sport! #zelda #zeldabotw #asixverse #blerd
entry.content: This is the one thing I miss in BOTW. This has to be top three glitches in any game. This should be a sport! #zelda #zeldabotw #asixverse #blerd

entry.title: I don’t remember this happening in Mega Man X4… #asixverse #megaman #supermario #blerd #retrogaming
entry.content: I don’t remember this happening in Mega Man X4… #asixverse #megaman #supermario #blerd #retrogaming

entry.title: And yall said Mega Man X7 was a bad game. Seems pretty lit to me. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #megaman #supermario #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: And yall said Mega Man X7 was a bad game. Seems pretty lit to me. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #megaman #supermario #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: I enjoyed playing as Chris but this part got to me a bit. Its probably fatigue from having that headset on my head for four hours. 😅 #asixverse #residentevil #blerd #gaming
entry.content: I enjoyed playing as Chris but this part got to me a bit. Its probably fatigue from having that headset on my head for four hours. 😅 #asixverse #residentevil #blerd #gaming

entry.title: This is not how I remember Sonic Adventure. This must be that a secret level or somethind after you collect the armor parts… #asixverse #blerd #supermario #retrogaming
entry.content: This is not how I remember Sonic Adventure. This must be that a secret level or somethind after you collect the armor parts… #asixverse #blerd #supermario #retrogaming

entry.title: This is not how I remembered Mega Man X4. Vile is about to get star power and what is Iris even fighting for!!! Heads up! If its Friday and I’m live then come play a game of Super Mario Coop DX with me. Its gonna be a foolishly jovial time! #Asixverse #S
entry.content: This is not how I remembered Mega Man X4. Vile is about to get star power and what is Iris even fighting for!!! Heads up! If its Friday and I’m live then come play a game of Super Mario Coop DX with me. Its gonna be a foolishly jovial time! #Asixverse #S

entry.title: Like come one! I knew he was gonna get up out that chair when I got the key item. Its all good… I set a trap card and got up outta there! Dizam! #Asixverse #blerd #residentevil #videogames
entry.content: Like come one! I knew he was gonna get up out that chair when I got the key item. Its all good… I set a trap card and got up outta there! Dizam! #Asixverse #blerd #residentevil #videogames

entry.title: This is not how I remembered Kirby and the Crystal Shards. 🤔 Should I do another coop game tomorrow? If enough people come through we might do hide and seek. Cast: Kirby - King the Asix Black Zero - @681_playa
entry.content: This is not how I remembered Kirby and the Crystal Shards. 🤔 Should I do another coop game tomorrow? If enough people come through we might do hide and seek. Cast: Kirby - King the Asix Black Zero - @681_playa

entry.title: This part took me a minute. These mecha zombies had one mission and they succeeded a couple of times. 😅 I should definitely do more Resident Evil VR! #Asixverse #blerd #residentevil #gaming
entry.content: This part took me a minute. These mecha zombies had one mission and they succeeded a couple of times. 😅 I should definitely do more Resident Evil VR! #Asixverse #blerd #residentevil #gaming

entry.title: The Twilight Princess PC port dropped yesterday and what prefect timing. I was looking for something to play on live. Might finish the Link to the Past randomizer I got going and jump in. I try to late nights around 12m-1am on Monday and Wednesday and aro
entry.content: The Twilight Princess PC port dropped yesterday and what prefect timing. I was looking for something to play on live. Might finish the Link to the Past randomizer I got going and jump in. I try to late nights around 12m-1am on Monday and Wednesday and aro

entry.title: Bro… I’m running for my life and then outta nowhere my back starts itching. Could you imagine that happening in reality. Thank god my wonderful wife tossed me the back scratcher! #asixverse #blerd #residentevil #gaming
entry.content: Bro… I’m running for my life and then outta nowhere my back starts itching. Could you imagine that happening in reality. Thank god my wonderful wife tossed me the back scratcher! #asixverse #blerd #residentevil #gaming

entry.title: Got a lot of memories with Soul Calibur 2 in the bowling alley arcade on and on the Gamecube. Loved smacking folks with the stick! #asixverse #blerd #fightinggame #retrogaming
entry.content: Got a lot of memories with Soul Calibur 2 in the bowling alley arcade on and on the Gamecube. Loved smacking folks with the stick! #asixverse #blerd #fightinggame #retrogaming

entry.title: I enjoy the vigilante missions in GTA but this dude was driving like he has family or something. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #gtasanandreas
entry.content: I enjoy the vigilante missions in GTA but this dude was driving like he has family or something. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #gtasanandreas

entry.title: Well my Twilight Princess run is starting off well lol. Not sure how I voided out there but I figured it out eventually. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Well my Twilight Princess run is starting off well lol. Not sure how I voided out there but I figured it out eventually. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I forgot how much fun Bushido Ball and UFO50 as a whole is! I need to jump back in and finish some of those games. #asixverse #blerd #indiegames #gaming
entry.content: I forgot how much fun Bushido Ball and UFO50 as a whole is! I need to jump back in and finish some of those games. #asixverse #blerd #indiegames #gaming

entry.title: To be fair, he did beat me before this and this was just me getting my get back. At least he got a couple of good hits in lol. #asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: To be fair, he did beat me before this and this was just me getting my get back. At least he got a couple of good hits in lol. #asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Why didn’t anyone tell me you can carry the pups in Twilight Princess?! I need to find a way to do this the entire game! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #dogsoftiktok
entry.content: Why didn’t anyone tell me you can carry the pups in Twilight Princess?! I need to find a way to do this the entire game! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #dogsoftiktok

entry.title: Put in the next Fast and Furious cause it was nothing but the grace of family that kept me from flying off that mountain lmao #asixverse #retrogaming #gtasanandreas #blerd
entry.content: Put in the next Fast and Furious cause it was nothing but the grace of family that kept me from flying off that mountain lmao #asixverse #retrogaming #gtasanandreas #blerd

entry.title: Celeste might be top ten games for me. Always a fun game to revisit. I need to get back into it and complete the C sides. #asixverse #indiegames #blerd #gaming
entry.content: Celeste might be top ten games for me. Always a fun game to revisit. I need to get back into it and complete the C sides. #asixverse #indiegames #blerd #gaming

entry.title: This enlarged mutated deku baba thought he was the mid boss but I showed him what’s what! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: This enlarged mutated deku baba thought he was the mid boss but I showed him what’s what! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: UFO50 was so ambitious and inspiring as a gamedev. Seaside Drive might be my favorite game in the bunch. I almost made a game similar to it. #asixverse #indiegames #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: UFO50 was so ambitious and inspiring as a gamedev. Seaside Drive might be my favorite game in the bunch. I almost made a game similar to it. #asixverse #indiegames #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
